title.en: China-to-EU Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入欧盟：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入歐盟：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China power-tool compliance against EU CE, machinery, electrical safety, EMC, outdoor noise, RoHS, and battery requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动工具合规与欧盟 CE、机械、电气安全、电磁兼容、户外噪声、RoHS 及电池要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動工具合規與歐盟 CE、機械、電氣安全、電磁相容、戶外噪聲、RoHS 及電池要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, customs determination, market-access approval, or product-safety design review. Exporters and importers should verify current EU law, harmonised standards, battery obligations, noise requirements, and destination-country enforcement practice with qualified professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、公告机构评审、海关裁定、市场准入批准或产品安全设计评审。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格专业人士核验现行欧盟法律、协调标准、电池义务、噪声要求及目的国执法实践。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、公告機構評審、海關裁定、市場准入批准或產品安全設計評審。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格專業人士核驗現行歐盟法律、協調標準、電池義務、噪聲要求及目的國執法實務。

answer_first.en: For China-made electric or cordless power tools entering the EU, the mandatory baseline is CE compliance under machinery law, LVD where applicable, EMC, outdoor noise for listed outdoor equipment, RoHS, and the EU Battery Regulation for battery-powered tools; EN 62841 is voluntary but commonly used to show conformity.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的有线或无绳电动工具进入欧盟，强制基线是按机械法规、适用时的低电压指令、电磁兼容、列名户外设备噪声、RoHS 以及电池供电工具的欧盟电池法规完成 CE 合规；EN 62841 是自愿采用但常用于证明符合性的路径。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的有線或無繩電動工具進入歐盟，強制基線是按機械法規、適用時的低電壓指令、電磁相容、列名戶外設備噪聲、RoHS 以及電池供電工具的歐盟電池法規完成 CE 合規；EN 62841 是自願採用但常用於證明符合性的路徑。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, customs, market-surveillance authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
